name: Surprise Meat Loaf Squares
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Tomatoes; Stewed (can substitute with canned tomatoes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Mix the ground beef, eggplant, onion, egg, milk, oats, salt, and basil in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Spread the mixture evenly into an ungreased baking pan measuring 8 x 8 x 2 inches or 9 x 9 x 2 inches.
4. Bake uncovered for 45 to 50 minutes.
5. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before cutting into squares.
6. Mix the tomatoes, garlic, cornstarch, and salt in a small saucepan. Cook, stirring constantly, until thickened and boiling.
7. Stir for an additional minute and serve by topping the meat loaf with the tomato sauce.
NOTE:
Any type of summer squash can be substituted for the eggplant in this recipe.
